title: Proof of Onchain Activity
description: Verify wallet activity depth and onchain history as a proof of genuine use.
useCase: Issue a proof-of-personhood score for any wallet — score wallets on transaction history, wallet age, and multi-chain diversity to filter Sybil accounts from airdrop campaigns.

keyParams.chainName: Primary chain to check activity on (e.g. eth-mainnet)
keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to generate proof for
